shopping_325.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent failed to correctly interpret "closely resembles the item on the right in the image". The purchased "sports car mouse" does not visually resemble the simple, ergonomic white mouse shown in the objective image.
2. The agent prioritized finding a "blue mouse" and the "cheapest item" over the crucial visual similarity aspect of the objective.
shopping_325.REFLECTION: When the objective specifies "closely resembles" an item in an image, prioritize the visual characteristics such as shape, form factor, and general design. Do not select novelty items if the original item is standard. Refine search queries to include descriptive terms that capture the visual resemblance (e.g., "simple blue mouse", "ergonomic blue mouse") and then filter by color and price.
